name: taprun
description: Tap — local-first authenticated browser automation. Install the Tap MCP server + the skills that work with it, in one step.

plugins.name: tap
plugins.description: Local-first authenticated browser automation. Bundles the Tap MCP server (capture/verify/mark/run + saved taps as resources) and the tap-capture-replay skill. Record a repeated logged-in browser task once; replay it forever in your own Chrome as a deterministic program at zero LLM tokens — credentials never leave your machine. For logged-in sites, run /tap:setup (installs the CLI + Chrome bridge, opens the extension page).

plugins.name: tap-skills
plugins.description: Skills that work with Tap: tap-triggers (schedule saved taps unattended, zero tokens per fire). Install alongside the tap plugin.
